scripts.dev: echo '🚀 Starting development servers...' && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:stream: echo '📺 Starting development servers in stream mode...' && turbo run dev --ui=stream
scripts.dev:tui: echo '🖥️  Starting development servers in TUI mode...' && turbo run dev --ui=tui
scripts.build: echo '🏗️  Building all packages...' && turbo run build
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing lint issues...' && biome lint --write .
scripts.type-check: echo '✅ Type checking...' && turbo run type-check
scripts.check: echo '🔍 Running all checks...' && biome check .
scripts.check:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing all issues...' && biome check --write .
scripts.clean: echo '🧹 Cleaning build artifacts...' && turbo run clean
